test.observation: 499 tests passed, 0 failed, 3 ignored. Tests ran with --lib flag to avoid pre-existing cdylib/V8 linking issue on Linux host.

lint.observation: 30 clippy errors found. Verified these are ALL pre-existing (exist on pre-provider-abstraction commits). Errors include: collapsible_if, redundant_closure, await_holding_lock, too_many_arguments, type_complexity, useless_conversion, clone_on_copy, new_without_default, single_match, needless_borrow, redundant_slicing, needless_borrows_for_generic_args. None introduced by the provider-abstraction milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: connect_with_provider is missing spawn_post_connect_warmup. All other connect methods call it. Provider-backed sessions won't get thread list prefetching.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add spawn_post_connect_warmup call after session insertion in connect_with_provider.

nonBlockingIssues.description: ApprovalRequested and UserInputRequested events mapped as LegacyNotification rather than ServerEvent::Request. The approval resolution pipeline won't work through provider path yet.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Map these to ServerEvent::Request with reconstructed request types when provider-backed sessions need approval flows.

nonBlockingIssues.description: $resolve/$reject fallback in from_provider produces RpcError::Deserialization instead of being a no-op for CodexProvider-backed sessions.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add RpcError::Deserialization to the fallback error catch, or route resolve/reject through ProviderCommand instead of generic send_request.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Reconnect retry loop logic (REMOTE_RECONNECT_MAX_ATTEMPTS=5) not yet adapted for provider trait. Currently reconnect_remote_client operates on AppServerClient directly.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Extend reconnect logic to work through ProviderTransport trait for non-Codex providers in future milestones.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Config change rejection logic (model/reasoning_effort during streaming) lives only in ErrorMockProvider, not in real CodexProvider.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add streaming_active check to CodexProvider.send_request when implementing config changes in future milestones.

nonBlockingIssues.description: ~23 upstream ServerNotification variants map to ProviderEvent::Unknown via wildcard. No compile-time exhaustiveness guarantee when upstream changes.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Acceptable for initial implementation. Track unmapped variants in library docs. Add typed mappings as needed.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/provider-transport.md with upstream event mapping coverage details, broadcast channel behavior note, and updated future work section.
Fixed .factory/library/architecture.md module paths to reflect actual flat file structure (codex.rs not codex/), added mapping.rs and error_handling.rs entries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note: ProviderTransport trait methods use async_trait for object safety. Workers should not add generic type parameters or impl Trait returns to trait methods as this breaks object safety.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: provider-transport-trait feature correctly uses async_trait pattern. Future workers implementing new providers should follow this pattern.

rejectedObservations.observation: architecture.md should document provider event-to-server-event LegacyNotification mapping pattern.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already adequately documented in provider-transport.md library file which is the appropriate place for this implementation detail.
